title: chromolaena clematitis
intro: Chromolaena clematitis, also known as Eupatorium, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Chromolaena clematitis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as malaria and snake bites. Chromolaena clematitis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
